source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
As shown in the figure, a uniform electric field is formed between two parallel metal plates $A$ and $B$ carrying opposite charges. An electron is injected into the electric field along the central line perpendicular to the direction of the electric field with an initial velocity $v_{0} = 4 \times 10^{6} \, \mathrm{m/s}$ from point $O$. When the electron exits the electric field at point $C$ on the right edge, its velocity direction forms a $30^{\circ}$ angle with the direction of $v_{0}$. The charge of the electron is $e = 1.6 \times 10^{-19} \, \mathrm{C}$, and the mass of the electron is $m = 0.91 \times 10^{-30} \, \mathrm{kg}$.

1. What is the kinetic energy of the electron at point $C$ in $\mathrm{J}$?
2. What is the magnitude of the potential difference between points $O$ and $C$ in $\mathrm{V}$?

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'As shown in the figure'
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false in the input
the setup refers to spatial layout between parallel plates and point locations O and C, which are usually diagram-grounded
however, the text already states the key geometric relation (motion perpendicular to field and 30 degree exit angle), so the image may be supportive rather than strictly necessary
multi_step: the problem asks for two outputs: kinetic energy at C and potential difference between O and C
solving requires combining at least two physics steps: infer final speed/components from the 30 degree direction change, then compute kinetic energy, then use energy-potential relation
the answer is not multiple choice and requires numerical derivation rather than direct lookup
verifiability: answer_text provides two explicit numerical results with units
the quantities are standard physics outputs that can be checked by formula-based computation
the question includes all core constants needed for calculation (v0, e, m, angle)

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图像资产均齐全，asset registry 无 issues 且已通过校验
综合信号较强：multi_step_score 和 verifiability_score 均高，适合作为候选样本保留
虽有图像依赖不完全确定的风险标记，但题干文本已包含大部分关键关系，不构成核心语义缺失
不存在题干或答案缺失等导致无法恢复核心语义的问题
